metadata.description: Open plugin marketplace for Claude Code — MCP-first packs covering the development lifecycle

plugins.name: marvin-core-pack
plugins.description: Core developer tools as MCP prompts: commits, PRs, code review, debugging, ADRs, changelogs, READMEs, migration plans, code explanation, docs search

plugins.name: marvin-security-pack
plugins.description: Security-focused MCP prompts: OWASP scanning, threat modeling, secret/dependency/IaC scans, CI/CD security, compliance checks, pentest planning, security fix generation

plugins.name: marvin-taskmaster-pack
plugins.description: Spec-driven task pipeline as MCP prompts: interactive spec co-creation, interactive execution, verification gates, delivery, and PR review fixing

plugins.name: marvin-tasks-pack
plugins.description: Lightweight per-project task tracker with interactive MCP-elicit forms — inquirer-style speed inside Claude Code
